payload.text:
Here's what I can do:

/start — Show the main menu
/help  — Show this help message

Or tap a button on the main menu to get started.

name: Unknown commands get a friendly fallback (no crash)

payload.text: Hmm, /nonsense isn't a command I know. Try /help to see what I can do.
Hmm, /nonsense isn't a command I know. Try /help to see what I can do.

name: Unknown commands are case-insensitive (lowercased before lookup)

payload.text: Hmm, /nonsense isn't a command I know. Try /help to see what I can do.

name: A known command (e.g. /start) still reaches its handler after the unknown-command middleware

payload.text:
Welcome to HomeLeadBot, Test! 🏠

You're registered as an agent. I help you post listings, capture buyer leads, and deliver hot-lead notifications. Pick an option below to get started.

name: An error thrown by a handler is caught by the error boundary and replied to gracefully

payload.text: Sorry, something went wrong on my side. Please try again in a moment.
